titulo: Fill the Gap: Numbers in Sentences
descripcion: Complete the sentence with the correct number word!

misiones.instruccion: Choose the correct number word to complete the sentence.

retos.explicacion: Two = dos. We have two hands!
Four = cuatro. Cats have four legs!

retos.oracion: There are ___ days in a week.
retos.traduccion: Hay siete dias en una semana.
retos.explicacion: Seven = siete. A week has seven days!
Ten = diez. We have ten fingers!

retos.oracion: There are ___ months in a year.
retos.traduccion: Hay doce meses en un ano.
retos.explicacion: Twelve = doce. A year has twelve months!
Three = tres. A triangle has three sides!
